name: spritesheet-creator
description: Generate 3x2 chroma-key sprite sheets, remove backgrounds, crop transparent frames, and export GIF previews.

interface.shortDescription: Create 3x2 sprite sheets, remove chroma-key backgrounds, crop frames, and export GIFs.
interface.longDescription: Workflow and scripts for generating 3x2 animation sprite sheets on flat chroma-key backgrounds, then cropping grid cells, removing the background, creating transparent spritesheets, exporting individual PNG frames, and building GIF previews. Also includes an optional helper for batch icon sheets.
defaultPrompt: Create a 3x2 sprite sheet and GIF.
Turn this 3x2 sprite sheet into frames.
Make a game attack animation sheet on green.
